data.body: CHECKPOINT: Phase 2 (implementation-plan) complete for all 6 stories. Batch 1 ready to dispatch but halted: MAX_AGENTS=0 (usage PAUSED — 5hr at 4900%). Resume when usage clears. Batch 1: b8f4-02a9 (TRIVIAL) + ce5f-9c4e (children: f4f3-6548 RED, fbd3-0f50 GREEN). Layer 2: 81f1-ced3 (d2d7-fc65, 6bf3-55f8), ca2f-7207 (c968-8ce0, 5544-6850, 5b37-bee6, 993b-6d2f), 8fdd-d3fb (aed8-2a37, 3c41-04fc, c836-a027). Layer 3: 93ee-89d3 (TRIVIAL e2e). Also: orphaned tasks be02-33e9, 7634-3d70, 0378-fa8b, b61e-9262 need closing after bug 2f20-eb16.
